postCreateCommand: /opt/conda/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && /opt/conda/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && /opt/conda/bin/python -m ipykernel install --user --name base --display-name "base" && /opt/conda/bin/python -m ipykernel install --user --name python3 --display-name "Python 3 (base)"
